Title: Prohibits adult-use cannabis dispensaries from being located within a certain distance of the property boundary of a public school, public park, or beach
Summary: Prohibits adult-use cannabis dispensaries from being located within one thousand feet from the property boundary of a public school, public park, or beach.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the cannabis law, in relation to prohibiting adult-use cannabis dispensaries from being located within a certain distance of the property boundary of a public school, public park, or beach
